experiments.title: Shorter subject line
experiments.hypothesis: Trimming the subject to under 45 characters lifts open and reply rate in tier-1 senior channels.
experiments.channel: Senior Living / Assisted, Caregiver / Senior Resource
experiments.next_step: Author A/B variant and reserve next 6 tier-1 sends for the shorter subject.

experiments.title: Materials-first senior follow-up
experiments.hypothesis: Leading the follow-up with the seminar materials packet (no second ask) converts the prior positive materials request into a scheduled session.
experiments.next_step: Operator sends materials packet today; CC ops only after positive engagement, per guardrail.

experiments.title: Hospice oral-comfort resource angle
experiments.hypothesis: A clinical resource framing (oral comfort for end-of-life patients) outperforms generic seminar pitch in hospice/home-health.
experiments.next_step: Draft resource-led variant; reserve next 4 hospice sends for this angle.

experiments.title: Phone/form follow-up for no-email high-fit
experiments.hypothesis: High-fit senior-living and home-care orgs without a public email convert via phone or contact-form follow-up at meaningfully higher rates than waiting for email enrichment.
experiments.channel: Senior Living / Assisted, Home Care / Hospice / Health
experiments.next_step: Operator works the no-email shortlist daily; log outcomes back to the Sheet.

experiments.title: Reply-rate baseline lock
experiments.hypothesis: Holding subject and body constant for 20 sends per tier-1 channel produces a stable reply-rate baseline to compare future copy tests against.
experiments.next_step: Define control copy; lock variant rotation cadence after EXP-01 and EXP-03 complete.

google_ads_insights.title: Google Ads Waste Watch
google_ads_insights.subtitle: Paid media office watch for the first linked Google Ads child account. Manager-account, customer-IDs, and account labels are intentionally not exposed in the public mirror.
google_ads_insights.automation_status: Manual refresh. Daily automation pending user confirmation; no scheduled job is active.

coverage.office_label_policy: First linked office account - mapping pending. Office identifiers and account IDs are never exposed in the public mirror; campaign-name groupings are used as a safer office hint where available.
coverage.next_step: Link the remaining office customer IDs under the manager account so each office can be reported as its own row in this section.

risk_summary.note: High-risk campaigns currently absorb the largest share of spend without matching conversion volume. Prioritize search-query review and negative-keyword sweeps before raising any budget.

campaign_groups.office_label: First linked office account - mapping pending
campaign_groups.office_hint: Inferred from campaign-name prefixes (JZ-Search, PMAX, Insurance, General-Search, Emergency).
campaign_groups.note: Account ID intentionally omitted from public mirror. Office mapping resolves once the remaining customer IDs are linked under the manager account.

flags: CPA more than triple account average
campaigns.recommended_action: Review search queries and ad-group targeting. Add negatives for low-intent terms; isolate brand vs non-brand traffic before sustaining spend.

flags: Conversion rate under 2 pct on highest-click search campaign
CPA roughly five times account average
campaigns.recommended_action: Audit landing page and offer fit. Pause or rebuild if no conversion-rate lift after a one-week negative-keyword sweep.
Hold spend. Validate asset-group performance against the Insurance Performance Max benchmark; pull placements report weekly.

flags: Strong conversion rate; consider scaling carefully
campaigns.recommended_action: Continue. Test a measured budget lift only after confirming CPA holds for two consecutive weeks.

flags: Healthy conversion rate; CPC running above account average
campaigns.recommended_action: Maintain. Trim high-CPC keywords that do not convert in a 14-day window.

flags: Best CPA and conversion rate in the account
campaigns.recommended_action: Protect. Use as the benchmark when reviewing JZ-Search-Cam and the older PMAX line.

flags: Very high CPC; thin click volume
campaigns.recommended_action: Monitor. Acceptable for emergency intent but verify call-tracking attribution before increasing budget.
Hold at minimum spend or pause. Revisit only with a Spanish-language landing page and call routing.

recommended_actions: Cut or rebuild JZ-Search-Cam - Dentical: 1.53 pct conversion rate and CPA over 260 USD on the largest search-click base in the account.
Run a negative-keyword and search-query sweep on JZ-Search-Clove before sustaining spend at a 10 USD CPC.
Use Insurance-Performance Max-15/4/26 as the conversion-rate benchmark when judging the older PMAX - gbp line.
Pause or down-weight JZ-Search-Clove - Spanish until a Spanish landing page and call routing are in place.
Link the remaining office customer IDs under the manager account so this section can break out spend and CPA per office.
operator_notes: Data is pulled directly from the Google Ads API for the LAST_30_DAYS window; all customer and manager account IDs are intentionally omitted from the public mirror.
Daily automation is pending user confirmation. Until then, this section is refreshed manually alongside the rest of the snapshot.
Office labels will replace the placeholder once the remaining customer IDs are linked and a private mapping table is in place.

_sanitization.policy: Public dashboard exposes only aggregate metrics, category/status summaries, redacted operator action items, operating guardrails, and aggregated Google Ads campaign metrics. Individual prospect emails, prospect names, reply sender names/addresses, free-text reply summaries, the operations Google Sheet ID and URL, recipient-level batch details, private operations-repo commit hashes, and Google Ads manager/customer account identifiers are removed.
